parameters.text:
=Candidate Profile

{{ JSON.stringify($('Code in JavaScript').first().json, null, 2) }}

==================================================

Job

{{ JSON.stringify($json, null, 2) }}

==================================================

TASK

STEP 1

Read ONLY the job description.

Extract ONLY explicit technical requirements.

Technical requirements include ONLY:

- Programming languages
- Databases
- Frameworks
- Libraries
- Cloud platforms
- Software
- BI tools
- Version control
- Operating systems
- Technologies

Examples

Python
SQL
Power BI
Excel
Tableau
R
TensorFlow
PyTorch
Scikit-learn
Pandas
NumPy
Spark
Docker
Kubernetes
Git
Linux
AWS
Azure
GCP
MATLAB
Java
JavaScript
Node.js
React
Angular
Vue
C++
C#
PHP
MongoDB
PostgreSQL
MySQL
Oracle

DO NOT extract

- Responsibilities
- Company description
- Benefits
- Soft skills
- Communication
- Leadership
- Problem solving
- Fast learner
- Team player
- Motivation
- Customer focus

IMPORTANT

If Python is NOT explicitly written

DO NOT extract Python.

If SQL is NOT explicitly written

DO NOT extract SQL.

If Docker is NOT explicitly written

DO NOT extract Docker.

Never guess.

Never infer from the job title.

--------------------------------------------------

STEP 2

Candidate skills are ONLY

{{ $('Code in JavaScript').item.json.candidate.skills }}

Create

matched_skills

missing_skills

Rules

matched_skills =
skills appearing in BOTH

candidate skills

AND

explicit job skills

missing_skills =
explicit job skills
that are NOT in the candidate profile.

Never invent skills.

Never duplicate skills.

--------------------------------------------------

STEP 3

Score

Technical Skills (40)

40
Candidate has nearly all required technical skills.

30
Candidate has most.

20
Candidate has some.

10
Candidate has few.

0
Candidate has none.

--------------------------------------------------

Experience (25)

Compare ONLY explicit experience requirements.

If the description says

"3 years"

compare it.

If the description DOES NOT specify experience

experience_score = 15

Do NOT give 25 automatically.

--------------------------------------------------

Education (15)

Compare required degree.

If no education requirement exists

education_score = 10

--------------------------------------------------

Projects (10)

Give points ONLY if candidate projects use technologies required by the job.

Otherwise give lower score.

--------------------------------------------------

Languages (10)

Score ONLY if the job explicitly requires languages.

If no language requirement exists

languages_score = 10

--------------------------------------------------

Final Score

score =
technical_score +
experience_score +
education_score +
projects_score +
languages_score

--------------------------------------------------

Level

90-100
Excellent Match

80-89
Very Good Match

70-79
Good Match

60-69
Fair Match

Below 60
Poor Match

--------------------------------------------------

Recommendation

Excellent Match

Apply Immediately

Very Good Match

Strongly Recommended

Good Match

Worth Applying

Fair Match

Optional

Poor Match

Not Recommended

--------------------------------------------------

Reason

Write ONE short sentence explaining the score.

Example

"Candidate matches 4 of 6 required technical skills."

--------------------------------------------------

Return ONLY

{
  "title": "",
  "company": "",
  "location": "",
  "link": "",
  "technical_score": 0,
  "experience_score": 0,
  "education_score": 0,
  "projects_score": 0,
  "languages_score": 0,
  "score": 0,
  "level": "",
  "recommendation": "",
  "matched_skills": [],
  "missing_skills": [],
  "reason": ""
}

messageValues.message: You are a senior ATS recruiter.  You compare ONE candidate profile with ONE job description.  Your evaluation MUST be based ONLY on the information provided.  STRICT RULES  - Use ONLY the candidate profile. - Use ONLY the job description. - Never use your own knowledge. - Never infer technologies from the job title. - Never invent skills. - Never invent experience. - Never invent education. - Never invent certifications. - Never invent languages. - Never assume a Data Analyst role requires Python or SQL. - If a technology is not explicitly written in the job description, it does NOT exist.  Only compare explicit requirements.  Return ONLY valid JSON.  No markdown.  No explanations.  No extra text.  No comments.

parameters.text: 📄 CV received successfully!  ⏳ Reading and analyzing your CV... This usually takes around 20–80 seconds.
⚠️ Invalid file.  Please send your CV in PDF format only.

=🏆 *Job Match*  *💼 Position:* {{ $json.title }}  *🏢 Company:* {{ $json.companyName }}  *📍 Location:* {{ $json.location }}  *⭐ Match:* *{{ $json.score }}/100*  *📈 Level:* {{ $json.level }}  *✅ Recommendation:* {{ $json.recommendation }}  *🟢 Matching Skills* {{ $json.matched_skills.join(", ") }}  *🔴 Missing Skills* {{ $json.missing_skills.join(", ") }}  *📝 Reason* {{ $json.reason }}  🔗 {{ $json.link }}

messageValues.message: You are an ATS resume parser.  Extract information ONLY from the provided CV.  Rules  - Return ONLY valid JSON. - No Markdown. - No explanations. - Do NOT invent information. - Extract only information explicitly present in the CV. - Remove duplicates. - If a field is missing, return "" or [].  ------------------------- SKILLS -------------------------  Extract the ACTUAL skills written in the CV.  Include only explicit items such as:  - Programming languages - Frameworks - Libraries - Databases - Software - Tools - Platforms - Technologies - Methodologies - Technical competencies  Examples of valid skills:  Python Java C++ SQL Power BI Excel TensorFlow PyTorch Scikit-learn React Node.js Docker AWS Git Linux MATLAB  Never return category names such as:  Programming Frameworks Libraries Databases Software Tools Platforms Technologies Methodologies Technical competencies  ------------------------- EXPERIENCE -------------------------  Extract every professional experience.  Return:  - company - position - duration  ------------------------- EDUCATION -------------------------  Extract:  - institution - degree - field - duration  ------------------------- PROJECTS -------------------------  Extract every project.  Return:  - name - technologies (only technologies explicitly mentioned)  ------------------------- LANGUAGES -------------------------  Extract spoken languages only.  ------------------------- PREFERRED JOB TITLES -------------------------  Generate between 5 and 7 REAL hiring job titles.  Base them ONLY on:  - education - experience - internship - technical skills  Projects may only support existing qualifications.  Requirements:  - Must be common job titles used on LinkedIn, Indeed or Glassdoor. - Must realistically fit the candidate. - Never invent careers. - Never convert projects into job titles. - Never convert thesis or research into job titles. - Do NOT generate:   Senior   Lead   Principal   Manager   Director   Architect   Consultant   Specialist  unless explicitly supported by the CV.  Use Junior, Graduate or Intern only if supported.  Return ONLY:  {   "skills": [],   "experience": [     {       "company": "",       "position": "",       "duration": ""     }   ],   "education": [     {       "institution": "",       "degree": "",       "field": "",       "duration": ""     }   ],   "projects": [     {       "name": "",       "technologies": []     }   ],   "languages": [],   "preferred_job_titles": [] }
